headline: Friday discipline stops the weekend damage now
summary: You're gaining 0.10 kg/week when you need to lose 0.71 kg/week. Today's choices—eating Huel portions and intentional movement—either accelerate your spiral or begin turning it around.
details: Eat four Huel meals today, zero snacking tolerance (Friday is your trigger—treat it like a test). Hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine this evening to create real movement debt. This matters because you're 0.81 kg/week behind pace with 11.5 months left—every single Friday you choose disipline compounds into your target weight; every Friday you slip compounds into failure.
